content:
🔥 TUI_bluetooth | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing and interacting with Bluetooth devices from a Linux terminal with a rich TUI.
✨ Key Features: • Device listing with status (connected, paired, nearby), signal strength, and battery level • Adapter control (power, visibility, scanning) • Pairing and connection with PIN/passkey handling • AVRCP media control for audio devices • Automatic audio routing via PulseAudio/PipeWire
📖 Summary: bluetui is a terminal-based TUI manager for Bluetooth devices on Linux. It provides a user-friendly interface to control adapters, manage paired and nearby devices, and interact with audio and TV remotes, all without requiring sudo privileges.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
